news.t: Baillie Gifford Debuts Suite of Active Growth ETFs
Baillie Gifford Launches U.S. ETF Suite, Expanding Access to Active Growth Strategies

holdings.infoBox: BGGG is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 6.74%, NVIDIA at 6.72%, ASML Holding at 5.91%, Cloudflare at 4.79%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.57%.

overview.description: The Baillie Gifford Long Term Global Growth ETF (BGGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed global equity ETF that invests in companies the adviser believes have strong long-term growth potential. The fund maintains a concentrated portfolio of growth-oriented businesses across developed and emerging markets and typically holds investments for extended periods. BGGG was launched on Jun 10, 2014 and is issued by Baillie Gifford Funds.
